description: Bounded, source-backed public research brief with an owner review gate.

human_gate.prompt: Owner reviews the bounded research brief before closing the run.

cleanup_policy: Capture canonical evidence first, then archive only the disposable Kanban card created for this run.
evidence_expectations: Brief distinguishes verified facts from unknowns.
Sources are public and cited by URL.
No unsourced claim, credential, cookie, token, or login-required content in evidence.
